channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The Hidden Costs of Withholding: Why We Should Reconsider Silence
item.description: In this article, Leslie John, a professor at Harvard Business School, explores the concept of oversharing and the importance of balancing privacy with openness. The piece challenges the common instinc...

item.title: Three dead, 14 injured in Austin bar shooting with possible terrorism ties
item.description: A shooting incident in Austin, Texas, has left three people dead and 14 others wounded. The event occurred early Sunday morning at Buford’s, a popular beer garden located in the city’s entertainment d...

item.title: First Baby in the UK Born Following Womb Transplant from Deceased Donor
item.description: A baby boy has become the first child in the United Kingdom to be born to a mother who received a womb transplant from a deceased donor. Hugo Powell was delivered by caesarean section in December at Q...

item.title: Metropolitan Police still lacking DNA and fingerprint data for many officers
item.description: Nearly half of the Metropolitan Police officers' DNA is still missing from the force's elimination database, which could impact its ability to clear innocent officers from crime scene samples and hind...

item.title: Factors Behind England's Recent Struggles in the Six Nations
item.description: England's rugby team has experienced a sharp decline in form after a year-long winning streak, suffering consecutive defeats against Scotland and Ireland in the Six Nations tournament. Head coach Stev...

item.title: Latest updates on Mandelson's arrest and ongoing situation in Ukraine
item.description: The news article highlights two major topics currently in the headlines. First, Peter Mandelson, a former UK politician, has reportedly been arrested, though details surrounding the reasons and contex...

item.title: UK Armed Forces Minister Draws Parallels Between Ukraine Conflict and Pre-WWII Tensions
item.description: Al Carns, a former Royal Marines special forces colonel and UK armed forces minister, highlighted that Russia's invasion of Ukraine and associated threats to the UK share significant similarities with...

item.title: Investigation Underway After Death of Jordan James Parke in London
item.description: Two individuals have been arrested on suspicion of manslaughter following the death of 34-year-old Jordan James Parke, known as the 'British Lip King.' Parke, who had gained public attention for his c...

item.title: Three US Troops Killed as Iran Retaliates Across the Middle East
item.description: Three US troops have been killed as Iran's retaliatory strikes have intensified across the Middle East, following the assassination of its Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Iran launched ballist...

item.title: Benjamin Sesko's Late Goal Secures Narrow Premier League Victory for Manchester United at Everton
item.description: Manchester United secured a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Everton in their Premier League encounter, with substitute Benjamin Sesko making the decisive impact. In a tightly contested match at Goodison ...

item.title: Impact of Iran's Strikes on Residents and Tourists in Dubai Amid Ongoing Conflict
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the US and Iran has taken a personal toll on many residents and visitors in Dubai, as Iranian drones and missiles target key infrastructure in the UAE. On day two of the w...

item.title: Former Children's Home Manager Found to Have Abused Six Children Over Nearly Two Decades
item.description: Two women have publicly waived their lifelong right to anonymity to describe the sexual abuse they suffered as children at Skircoat Lodge, a residential children’s home in Halifax. Karen Bentham and K...

item.title: Starmer grants US permission to use RAF bases for defensive operations against Iran
item.description: Keir Starmer, the UK Prime Minister, has reversed his decision on allowing US forces to use RAF bases in Cyprus. The change comes after Iran’s escalating missile attacks in the Middle East, which have...

item.title: Australia Launches Royal Commission to Investigate Antisemitism Following Bondi Beach Mass Shooting
item.description: Australia has formally begun a landmark royal commission into antisemitism following the Bondi Beach mass shooting that killed 15 people and injured 40 others in December last year. The federal inquir...

item.title: Sesko and Lammens help Manchester United strengthen their Champions League bid
item.description: Manchester United's recent performances have been significantly boosted by the contributions of Benjamin Sesko and Senne Lammens. Sesko, 22, has demonstrated remarkable progress, scoring crucial goals...

item.title: Community Voices Concerns Over Asylum Seeker Accommodation in Crowborough
item.description: In Crowborough, East Sussex, local residents and campaigners have expressed strong concerns over the Home Office’s decision to convert an army training centre into housing for around 540 asylum seeker...

item.title: Analysis of US Crime Trends Shows Decline, But 125-Year Low Claim Is Uncertain
item.description: US President Donald Trump has claimed that crime and murder rates in the United States are at their lowest in 125 years, attributing this to his policies focused on law enforcement. FBI data shows tha...

item.title: Former Philippine President Duterte Faces ICC Hearing Over Drug War Killings
item.description: Former Philippine president Rodrigo Duterte is facing a pre-trial hearing at the International Criminal Court (ICC) to determine whether he should stand trial for crimes against humanity. Duterte, who...

item.title: UK Terror Threat Under Scrutiny Following Iranian Retaliation
item.description: The UK’s terror threat level is under close review following recent military strikes on Iran by the US and Israel, which have led to a series of retaliatory attacks by Tehran. The strikes have targete...

item.title: Record Snowstorm Paralyzes US East Coast, Causing Flight Cancellations and Power Outages
item.description: A historic snowstorm struck the US east coast on Monday, bringing record-breaking snowfall and widespread disruptions. Rhode Island and Massachusetts recorded the highest totals, with nearly 33 inches...
